codeReview.summary: The feature implements the requested Phase 3 vertical slice: CLI compilation to an explicit output path, temporary hello-world codegen, gofmt post-processing, end-to-end execution coverage, and negative-path cleanup/error behavior. I did not find actionable blocking or non-blocking defects within the milestone scope.
